1776.source: Chris arrived at the office early, noticing a puddle forming near the entrance. He overheard colleagues whispering in the hallway, glancing toward the wet carpet. Confused, he wondered how so many people already knew something was wrong. The water pipe had burst, and somehow the entire office had found out about it, so Chris had to figure out where the leak was coming from. Someone had told the whole office, and Chris was determined to find out who.
